title: Adjusting visuals to user need(s) - text formatting, colours, column width etc
excerpt: Add the ability for the user to adjust the visuals (text formatting, colours, column width etc.) of the assets they are accessing in Monday.com (and remember the adjustment(s) for the next time the user is in the tool), …

posts.author: l_corre (CORRE)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the ability for the user to adjust the visuals (text formatting, colours, column width etc.) of the assets they are accessing in Monday.com (and remember the adjustment(s) for the next time the user is in the tool), without needing to be owner.

posts.author: RobbenR (RobbenR)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if you could color code the columns. This would help distinguish between different pieces of information on the board.
